cases.input: Help us define our product principles. We're thinking: 'Quality matters', 'Be user-focused', 'Ship fast', 'Data-driven', and 'Team first'.
cases.context: B2B SaaS startup, 3 years old, Series A, 50-person company, product team of 8, constitution creation mode

cases.input: We need a prioritization framework. Currently we have 45 feature requests and 3 different stakeholders each claiming their items are most important.
cases.context: Product constitution creation, Section 6 prioritization framework, scoring model and tiebreaker criteria needed

cases.input: Help us define our Customer Experience Philosophy. Our product is a project management tool for engineering teams.
cases.context: Product constitution Section 4, star level target needed, over-investment areas, what 'great' looks like for this product

cases.input: We wrote our product constitution 6 months ago. One of the sections hasn't been reviewed in 4 months. What should we do?
cases.context: Constitution Review mode, 90-day review rule, section flagging, last_reviewed dates, stale constitution risk

cases.input: We have 5 hypotheses about future product direction. How do we structure these as research bets?
cases.context: Product constitution Section 7, conviction levels required (high/medium/low), validation criteria, not just a feature wishlist
